login.title: Sign in to your AI workspace
login.subtitle: Use email and password, or a trusted OAuth provider, to continue to downloads, development support, certificates, and your dashboard.
login.privacyNote: Your account keeps support records, certificates, and dashboard settings tied to you.
login.adminAccessNotice: Use an administrator account to access the admin console.
login.humanVerificationError: Verify that you are human and try again.
login.registrationImmediateSuccess: Account created. You can sign in now.
login.registrationEmailSentTitle: Check your email to verify your account
login.registrationSuccess: If this is a new account, we sent a verification email. If this email is already registered, sign in or reset your password.
login.registrationNextStepOpen: Open the verification email from Gitbook AI.
login.registrationNextStepSpam: Check spam, promotions, or junk folders if it is not in your inbox.
login.registrationNextStepExpiry: The verification link expires, so resend it if it no longer works.
login.registrationRateLimited: Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.
login.resendConfirmationRateLimited: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
login.resendConfirmationSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.
login.signInError: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.
login.signUpError: Could not create the account. Check your email and password.
login.accountExistsError: This email is already registered. Sign in or reset your password.
login.passwordTooShortError: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.oauthError: Could not start sign in. Try another provider or use email.
login.callbackError: The sign-in link could not be verified. Please try again.
login.passwordResetComplete: Password updated. You can now sign in.
login.passwordResetError: Could not send the reset email. Check the address and try again.
login.passwordResetSent: Check your email for a password reset link.

home.title: GitBook AI
home.subtitle: Download the AI-powered coding book companion for structured programming knowledge, release notes, and developer learning workflows.
home.supportPrompt: Downloads stay free. Voluntary support keeps the AI knowledge engine improving.
home.featureOneText: Navigate code concepts, notes, and book-like knowledge with a focused software interface.
home.featureTwoText: Fast downloads, predictable releases, and a dashboard for certificates and supporter history.
home.featureThreeText: English-first with Chinese, Japanese, and Korean routes for international users.
home.relatedSubtitle: Keep going with release history, support, account tools, and product updates.
home.relatedVersionsText: Download previous macOS builds by chip type, or Windows builds, when you need a specific version.
home.relatedContributionsText: Support continued development with a one-time support and certificate.
home.relatedSupportText: Find contact channels, submit feedback, and follow your support conversations.
home.relatedNotificationsText: Read product updates, service notices, and account announcements.

footer.tagline: AI coding knowledge, secure downloads, and account support in one focused workspace.
footer.availability: macOS M chip, macOS Intel, and Windows releases

versions.title: Older versions
versions.subtitle: Download previous GitBook AI builds. For macOS, choose the package that matches your Mac chip.
versions.empty: No public releases have been published yet.

donate.title: Support GitBook AI Development
donate.subtitle: Choose a one-time support amount to help with product releases, AI knowledge updates, cloud sync infrastructure, and supporter certificates.
donate.oneTimeNote: A one-time support that helps keep downloads available and development moving.
donate.paymentNote: Secure checkout with Dodo Payments for cards and supported local payment methods. A certificate is issued after successful payment.
donate.cancelled: Checkout was cancelled. You can review the support tiers and try again when ready.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Original AI-generated articles on artificial intelligence, visual recognition, and scientific imaging trends.
news.empty: No news articles are published yet.

desktopLogin.subtitle: After sign-in, this browser will return to the GitBook AI desktop app.
desktopLogin.authorizeError: Desktop authorization could not be prepared. Please sign in again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Read product updates, service notices, and account-related announcements.
notifications.empty: No notifications are available right now.

support.title: Help and feedback
support.subtitle: Use chat channels for the fastest help, or send account issue details through the feedback form.
support.channelsEmpty: No chat channels are configured yet.
support.subject: Subject
support.success: Feedback sent. We will review it soon.
support.error: Could not send feedback. Please try again.
support.signInRequiredDescription: Feedback is tied to your account so administrators can reply and continue the conversation with you.
support.replyPlaceholder: Add more context or answer the administrator...

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.subtitle: Learn how to download, install, and use GitBook AI desktop app with cloud sync and license codes.

download.title: Download the app
download.description: Visit the homepage to download the latest version of GitBook AI for your operating system and device chip.
download.step1: Go to the homepage and choose macOS for your Mac chip, or Windows for your PC
download.step2: Wait for the download to complete
download.step3: Open the downloaded file to begin installation

install.title: Install the app
install.description: Follow the installation steps for your operating system:

mac.title: macOS
mac.description: Download the .dmg that matches your Mac chip: Apple Silicon/M series for newer Macs, or Intel for older Macs. Open the file and drag GitBook AI to your Applications folder. You may need to allow apps from unidentified developers in System Settings.

windows.title: Windows
windows.description: Run the .exe installer and follow the on-screen prompts. The app will be installed in Program Files.

signin.title: Sign in to your account
signin.description: When you first launch GitBook AI, you'll need to sign in to your account to activate cloud sync features.
signin.note: If you don't have an account yet, you can register for free on the website.

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.description: Cloud sync allows you to access your AI coding knowledge across devices. Here's how to activate it:

trial.title: Trial Code (7 days)
trial.description: New users can redeem a trial code for 7 days of cloud sync access. Trial codes are distributed through official channels.

contributors.title: Supporter Access
contributors.description: Users who have made a one-time support to help GitBook AI development receive cloud sync access as a thank you. The duration depends on the support tier.

download.q: Where can I download GitBook AI?
download.a: Visit the homepage and click the download button for your operating system (macOS or Windows).

install.q: How do I install GitBook AI?
install.a: For macOS: open the .dmg file and drag the app to Applications. For Windows: run the .exe installer and follow the prompts.

cloudSync.a: Cloud sync allows your AI coding knowledge, notes, and reading progress to be synchronized across multiple devices.

trialCode.q: How do I get a trial code?
trialCode.a: Trial codes are distributed through our official community channels. Check our support page for information on how to obtain one.

certificate.q: How do I get a development support certificate?
certificate.a: After making a support on the Development Support page, a certificate is automatically generated and can be viewed in your dashboard.

contact.title: Still need help?
contact.description: If you couldn't find the answer you were looking for, please reach out to our support team.

dashboard.title: Personal center

trial.title: License code
trial.description: Redeem a team-provided license code for trial, monthly, quarterly, or yearly cloud sync access.
trial.bindingHelp: License code access starts immediately after redemption. Trial codes can be used once per account or device; paid codes extend existing active access.
trial.inactive: This license code is not active.
trial.limit: This license code has reached its redemption limit.
trial.machineUsed: This computer has already used a cloud sync trial.
trial.duplicate: This account or device has already used a trial code.
trial.error: Could not redeem the license code.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage cloud sync access, license codes, support history, certificates, and account security in one place.
dashboard.accessNotActive: No active cloud sync access yet

emailVerification.title: Verify your email for account security
emailVerification.description: Email verification adds an extra layer of security. Some features, like changing your password, require a verified email. Check your inbox and spam folder.
emailVerification.resendSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.
emailVerification.resendError: Could not send verification email. Try again later.

dashboard.welcomeVerified: Your email has been verified and your account is ready.
dashboard.welcomeUnverified: Welcome! Your account is ready. Verify your email to enable full account security.
dashboard.adminForbidden: This account does not have admin access. Switch to an administrator account or contact the site owner.
dashboard.passwordUnverified: Please verify your email before changing your password. Check your inbox for the verification email.

releases.title: Software releases
releases.deliveryModeFileHelp: Upload separate installers for macOS M chip, macOS Intel, and Windows.
releases.deliveryModeLinkHelp: Provide primary download links for macOS M chip, macOS Intel, and Windows. Backup links are optional.
releases.maxFileSizeHelp: Max 50 MB per file. Use download links for larger installers.
releases.uploadLimitError: Installer files must be 50 MB or smaller. Use download links for larger installers.

supportSettings.title: Support settings
supportSettings.description: Manage the public contact methods shown on the Support page.
supportSettings.sortOrderHelp: Smaller numbers appear first in the public channel list.
supportSettings.statusHelp: Switch this channel on only when the value is ready for public display.
supportSettings.valueHintTelegram: Use a full Telegram URL such as https://t.me/your_channel
supportSettings.valueHintDiscord: Use a full invite or server URL such as https://discord.gg/your-community
supportSettings.valueHintQQ: Use the public QQ number users should contact
supportSettings.valueHintEmail: Use the public mailbox users should email for support
supportSettings.valueHintWeChat: Use the public WeChat ID users should add
supportSettings.rowSavedDescription: This channel has been updated successfully.
supportSettings.guidanceBody: Enabled channels are shown publicly on the Support page. Use full URLs for Telegram and Discord, plain account identifiers for QQ or WeChat, and a valid mailbox for Email.
supportSettings.emailHelp: This is the public support mailbox shown to users. It is separate from account login email settings.
supportSettings.previewDescription: Edit each support channel below. Enabled entries will appear publicly in the configured order.
supportSettings.publicPreviewDescription: This is how the enabled support channels will appear to visitors on the Support page.
supportSettings.previewEmpty: No support contact channels are enabled yet.

policies.title: Policy pages
policies.description: Edit the English policy pages linked from the public footer.

certificates.description: Review issued certificates and revoke records when needed.

filter.searchPlaceholder: Search by action, target ID, or reason

auditLogs.description: Review administrative changes and support actions.

licenses.title: License management
licenses.createTrialDescription: Create one auto-generated cloud sync trial code. Trials default to 3 days and can be set up to 7 days.
licenses.cloudSyncCooldownDescription: Set how long a newly logged-in device must wait after another device releases cloud sync.
licenses.cloudSyncUsageSignalsDescription: Track active sync sessions, total usage duration, and multi-device sync attempts.
licenses.batchGenerateDescription: Generate trial, 1-month, 3-month, or 1-year license codes. Each batch is archived with channel metadata and encrypted plaintext reveal.
licenses.bulkActionsDescription: Select license codes to soft-delete them or add/reduce validity days with an audit reason.
licenses.label: Batch name
licenses.activationStartsOnRedeem: No activation window is needed. Validity starts when the user redeems the code.
licenses.revealHelp: Reveal only when sending this code to a user. The view is audited.
licenses.description: Generate, filter, reveal, and maintain channel license code batches.
licenses.searchPlaceholder: Search labels, code masks, notes, or IDs
licenses.securitySignalsDescription: Review recent license code redemption failures, blocks, and suspicious IP activity.
licenses.fixedPaidDurationsHelp: Monthly codes grant 1 calendar month from activation. Quarterly grants 3 calendar months; yearly grants 12 calendar months. Calculations use Beijing timezone. Only trial codes allow custom day counts (1-7 days).

users.title: User management
users.detailDescription: Review and maintain one user's profile, support records, certificates, trials, devices, and entitlements.
users.detailEntryHint: Detailed account, support records, certificates, and devices
users.searchPlaceholder: Email, display name, or user ID
users.archiveEntryDescription: Restore archived users or permanently delete records from the user archive.
users.accountCreationDescription: Invite a user or create a confirmed account with a temporary password.
users.passwordRecoveryDescription: This account needs a password before it can use email sign-in.
users.loginHistoryDescription: Recent login attempts for this user.
users.emptyFiltered: No users match the current filters.
users.dangerDescription: Permanently deleting a user removes the profile and cannot be undone.
users.dangerWarning: Only use this when the account must be fully erased.
users.deleteConfirmation: Type DELETE or the user email to confirm
users.userIsArchivedDescription: This user was archived and can be restored from the user archive.
users.cloudSyncUsageDescription: Review usage duration, current device state, and multi-device sync attempts.
users.cloudSyncUsageEmpty: No cloud sync usage sessions yet.
users.description: Review account roles, statuses, trial bindings, and desktop devices.

archivedUsers.title: User archive
archivedUsers.description: View and restore archived users, or permanently delete them.
archivedUsers.permanentDeleteConfirm: This cannot be undone. Confirm permanent deletion?
archivedUsers.bulkPermanentDeleteConfirm: This cannot be undone. Confirm permanent deletion of selected archived users?
archivedUsers.bulkPermanentDeleteDescription: Select archived users below, then permanently delete the selected archive records.

contributionPricing.title: Support pricing
contributionPricing.description: Manage Development Support page prices, discounts, and support tier copy.
contributionPricing.tiersDescription: Update the prices and copy shown on the Development Support page.
contributionPricing.tierStatusHelp: Inactive tiers are hidden from the Development Support page.
contributionPricing.paymentSettingsDescription: Save test and live Dodo product IDs without redeploying. Enabling both is normal: the app chooses one environment at runtime.
contributionPricing.paymentSettingsRuntimeBody: Production checkout uses live IDs when DODO_PAYMENTS_ENV is live. Test checkout uses test IDs only when the app is running in test mode.
contributionPricing.paymentEnvironmentTestHelp: Use these IDs for local or preview testing.
contributionPricing.paymentEnvironmentLiveHelp: Use these IDs for real customer payments.
contributionPricing.paymentProductHelp: Use the Dodo product ID for this tier and mode.

registrationSecurity.description: Review signup abuse patterns, inspect recent attempts, and temporarily block risky IPs, emails, or domains.
registrationSecurity.title: Registration security

certificate.title: Certificate of Appreciation
certificate.description: This certificate is presented with gratitude for meaningful support of independent software development.
certificate.shareError: Unable to share. Copy the link and try again.

download.title: Download certificate
download.note: Current exports are SVG only. Open the file in your browser to print or save as PDF; native PNG/PDF export is planned for a later release.
